scope.paper: AI for early cancer detection, screening, risk prediction, surveillance, liquid biopsy, and adjacent early-diagnosis methods.
scope.funding: Calls, programmes, and announcements relevant to researchers building AI for early cancer detection.
scope.job: Academic or research roles spanning AI, data science, imaging, biomarkers, screening, and prevention in cancer.

workflow.trigger: Manual trigger while the scope is still being refined.
workflow.review: AI drafts the digest; a human reviews before anything is sent.

email_template.preheader: Selected updates on AI for early cancer detection, screening, funding, and jobs.
